Bus Timings

Bus 44 Timetable Ghubaiba Bus Station to Rashidiya Bus Station Parking

October 11, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus 44 is your go-to ride in Dubai, zipping between Ghubaiba Bus Station · 2 and Rashidiya Bus Station Parking. It’s a real workhorse, hitting up neighborhoods, malls, and tourist spots all along the way. Whether you’re a local grinding through the daily commute or a visitor out to explore, this bus has you covered.

Need to catch the metro? No problem - 44’s got stops near stations too. It’s basically your all-in-one ticket to cruise Dubai without the hassle of driving. So next time you’re figuring out how to get around, just hop on 44 and let it do the heavy lifting.

Route Name 44
Route Description Ghubaiba Bus Station · 2 - Rashidiya Bus Station Parking
Total Distance Approximately 18-20 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 53 minutes
Operational Hours 04:30 to 23:26 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3 to AED 7.50
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 44

Bus 44 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus 44 operates at regular intervals throughout the day, ensuring that passengers have flexible travel options. Below are the timings for both directions:

From Ghubaiba Bus Station From Rashidiya Bus Station Parking
06:00 04:30
07:00 05:35
07:30 06:35
08:00 07:00
08:30 07:30
09:00 08:05
09:30 08:55
10:05 09:25

13:00 11:25

17:25 15:45

21:30 19:59

23:00 21:15
22:05  
22:45  
23:26  

Bus 44 Timetable

To find the schedule, head over to the RTA website, or you can click this link for Bus 44 Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus 44 follows the standard Dubai bus fare structure. Typically, the fare ranges between AED 3 to AED 7.50 depending on the distance traveled and the fare zones crossed during the journey. Payment can be made using a Nol card, which is a contactless smart card used for public transportation in Dubai.

Bus Booking

Dubai’s public transport services offer convenient options for trip planning. While there isn’t a specific online booking for bus seats, the RTA Dubai app provides route details, schedules, and live bus tracking. Passengers can recharge Nol cards online, and tourists can choose day or multiple-day passes for unlimited travel on public transport within the selected time frame. This ensures a smooth and hassle-free travel experience for everyone.

Bus Route

Bus 44 begins its journey at Ghubaiba Bus Station · 2 and heads towards Rashidiya Bus Station Parking, making numerous stops along the way. Key stops on this route include:

  1. Ghubaiba Bus Station · 2

  2. Raffa

  3. Rolla

  4. Sharaf DG Metro · 1

  5. Four Point Sheraton Hotel

  6. BurJuman Metro · 2

  7. Saeediya School

  8. Karama, 2

  9. Karama

  10. Commercial Center

  11. Schools Health Center

  12. Karama Ent.

  13. Central Post Office

  14. Al Wasl University

  15. Broadcast Interchange

  16. Oud Metha Metro · 1

  17. Oud Metha Road

  18. Oud Metha Road, 2

  19. Wafi City

  20. Police Officers Club

  21. Belhasa Driving Center

  22. Al Jaddaf, Binghatti Avenue

  23. Wasl Club

  1. Latifa Hospital

  2. Police Stadium

  3. Dubai Festival City, Marks & Spencer

  4. Dubai Festival City, IKEA

  5. Dubai Festival City, Festival Centre

  6. Dubai Festival City, Marks & Spencer

  7. Dubai Festival City

  8. Rebat Street

  9. Rebat Street, 2

  10. Umm Ramool, ENOC

  11. Rashidiya, Civil Defence

  12. Rashidiya

  13. Police Station

  14. Al Jahiz Boys School

  15. Rashidiya, Street 38

  16. Rashidiya Bus Station, Arrival

  17. Rashidiya Bus Station Parking

The route covers essential areas such as Karama, Oud Metha, and Dubai Festival City, making it a vital link for residents and tourists alike.

Bus 44 Station Overview

Ghubaiba Bus Station · 2

Ghubaiba Bus Station is one of Dubai’s busiest and most significant transport hubs, located in the Al Ghubaiba area. This station is known for its comprehensive facilities, including ample seating, ticketing services, and real-time bus schedule displays. Its strategic location makes it a central point for passengers traveling across Dubai, with easy access to nearby markets, historic sites, and the Dubai Creek.

Belhasa Driving Center Bus Stop Intersection

The Belhasa Driving Center Bus Stop serves as a key intersection for Bus Route 44 and Bus Route C4. This location provides essential connectivity between these routes, facilitating efficient travel for passengers in the area. With its strategic position, the bus stop offers convenient transfer options and access to various destinations, making it an important hub for daily commutes and travel needs.

Al Rashidiya, Street 33A, Al Jahiz Boys School Bus Stop Intersection

The Al Rashidiya, Street 33A, Al Jahiz Boys School Bus Stop is a key intersection point where Bus Routes 44 and 11A converge. This strategic location provides efficient connections between different parts of the city, facilitating convenient travel for residents and commuters in the Al Rashidiya area. The stop’s positioning ensures accessible and seamless transit options for those utilizing these bus routes.

Rashidiya Bus Station Parking

Rashidiya Bus Station Parking serves as a vital transit point located near the Rashidiya Metro Station, offering convenient access to the northern parts of Dubai. This station is equipped with essential amenities such as parking facilities, sheltered waiting areas, and real-time updates on bus schedules.

Its proximity to the Rashidiya Metro makes it an important interchange for passengers looking to connect between bus and metro services. The station’s accessibility and connectivity make it a crucial hub for residents and visitors traveling to various parts of the city.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

The Bus 44 route in Dubai passes through several notable tourist attractions and destinations:

  1. BurJuman Metro: Near the BurJuman Mall, one of Dubai’s oldest and most popular shopping malls, offering a variety of international retail outlets and dining options.

2.

  1. Wafi City: A unique shopping destination with Egyptian-themed architecture, featuring luxury stores, a souk, and a variety of restaurants.

4.

  1. Rashidiya: Near the Rashidiya Metro Station, which provides access to various parts of Dubai, and close to the Dubai International Airport, making it convenient for travelers.

These attractions make the Bus 44 route not just a means of transportation but also a way to explore some of Dubai’s popular spots.

Journey Experience

Bus route 44 from Ghubaiba Bus Station to Rashidiya Bus Station Parking offers a long and fascinating journey across key areas of Dubai. Starting at Ghubaiba, a historical transport hub near the Dubai Creek, the bus passes through vibrant neighborhoods such as Karama and Deira, known for their mix of cultures and bustling markets.

As the route progresses toward Rashidiya, home to Dubai’s busy metro station, you’ll witness the blend of old and new Dubai. Points of interest along the way include the Dubai Frame, offering stunning views of the city’s skyline, and Zabeel Park, a popular family destination. This journey captures the essence of Dubai’s dynamic urban landscape.

Travelling with Careem

The ride offers a convenient and comfortable alternative to the bus, with a price range of AED 64-77. Enjoy a smooth trip with real-time updates and assistance right at your fingertips.

The bus connects key areas, ensuring you can easily reach your destination without hassle. Whether you’re a resident or a visitor, Bus 44 provides a convenient and affordable way to experience Dubai. With frequent stops and timely schedules, it’s a dependable choice for your travel needs.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 11, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
